2603.16666.title: Fast-WAM: Do World Action Models Need Test-time Future Imagination?
2603.16666.paper_summary: World Action Models (WAMs) have emerged as a promising alternative to Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models for embodied control because they explicitly model how visual observations may evolve under action. Most existing WAMs follow an imagine-then-execute paradigm, incurring substantial test-time latency from iterative video denoising, yet it remains unclear whether explicit future imagination is actually necessary for strong action performance. In this paper, we ask whether WAMs need explicit future imagination at test time, or whether their benefit comes primarily from video modeling during training. We disentangle the role of video modeling during training from explicit future generation during inference by proposing \textbf{Fast-WAM}, a WAM architecture that retains video co-training during training but skips future prediction at test time. We further instantiate several Fast-WAM variants to enable a controlled comparison of these two factors. Across these variants, we find that Fast-WAM remains competitive with imagine-then-execute variants, while removing video co-training causes a much larger performance drop. Empirically, Fast-WAM achieves competitive results with state-of-the-art methods both on simulation benchmarks (LIBERO and RoboTwin) and real-world tasks, without embodied pretraining. It runs in real time with 190ms latency, over 4$\times$ faster than existing imagine-then-execute WAMs. These results suggest that the main value of video prediction in WAMs may lie in improving world representations during training rather than generating future observations at test time. Project page: https://yuantianyuan01.github.io/FastWAM/
2603.16666.paper_summary_zh: 世界行動模型（WAMs）已成為具身控制的一種有前途的替代方案，因為它們明確地建模了視覺觀察在行動下如何演變。大多數現有的WAMs遵循先想像再執行的範式，這導致了從迭代視頻去噪中產生的可觀測測試延遲，但目前尚不清楚明確的未來想像是否對強大的行動表現實際上是必要的。在本文中，我們探討WAMs在測試時是否需要明確的未來想像，或者它們的好處是否主要來自訓練期間的視頻建模。我們通過提出\textbf{Fast-WAM}來解開訓練期間視頻建模的角色與推理期間明確未來生成的關係，這是一種在訓練期間保留視頻共同訓練但在測試時跳過未來預測的WAM架構。我們進一步實現了幾個Fast-WAM變體，以便對這兩個因素進行受控比較。在這些變體中，我們發現Fast-WAM仍然與先想像再執行的變體具競爭力，而去除視頻共同訓練則會導致性能大幅下降。實證結果顯示，Fast-WAM在模擬基準（LIBERO和RoboTwin）和現實世界任務中均達到了與最先進方法相媲美的結果，且無需具身預訓練。它以190毫秒的延遲實時運行，比現有的先想像再執行的WAMs快超過4倍。這些結果表明，WAMs中視頻預測的主要價值可能在於改善訓練期間的世界表徵，而不是在測試時生成未來觀察。項目頁面：https://yuantianyuan01.github.io/FastWAM/
2603.16666.author: Tianyuan Yuan et.al.
2603.16666.authors: Tianyuan Yuan, Zibin Dong, Yicheng Liu, Hang Zhao
